title: nepeta teucriifolia
intro: Nepeta teucriifolia, also known as catmint, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to the mountainous regions of the Balkan Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as digestive problems, anxiety, and insomnia. The health benefits of Nepeta teucriifolia include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, while also exhibiting antiseptic and antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of Nepeta teucriifolia can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
